name: 1. Shipping delay (core revenue-saving case)
subject: Order hasn't arrived yet
body:
Hi,

I ordered one of your storage cases about 8 days ago and haven't received any updates since.

Could you please check where it is?

Thank you,
Anna

name: 2. Damaged product (high emotion)
subject: Issue with my order
body:
Hi,

My order arrived today but unfortunately the lid is scratched and doesn't close properly.

It's a beautiful piece otherwise, so I'd really appreciate your help resolving this.

Kind regards,
Michael

name: 3. Pre-purchase (high-value conversion)
subject: Question before purchasing
body:
Hi,

I'm considering purchasing one of your organisers and wanted to ask if it's suitable for watches as well as jewellery?

Thanks so much,
David

name: 4. Returns (friction moment)
subject: Return request
body:
Hi,

I received my order but it's not quite what I was expecting.

Could you please let me know how to arrange a return?

Best,
Sophie

name: 5. Cancellation (time-sensitive)
subject: Cancel my order please
body:
Hi,

I just placed an order but need to cancel it urgently.

Can you stop it before it ships?

Thanks,
Chris

name: 6. Billing issue (trust-sensitive)
subject: Charged twice?
body:
Hi,

I think I may have been charged twice for my order.

Can you please confirm and assist?

Thanks,
Rachel

name: 7. Wholesale / partnership (manual)
subject: Retail partnership enquiry
body:
Hi,

I own a boutique interiors store in Melbourne and would love to explore stocking your products.

Could you share your wholesale details?

Warm regards,
Isabella

name: 8. Praise / UGC (manual but valuable)
subject: Absolutely love my order
body:
Hi,

Just wanted to say how beautiful the piece is — it looks incredible in my space.

Thank you for such a thoughtful product.

Best,
Claire

name: 9. Spam / solicitation (ignore)
subject: Increase your sales by 300%
body:
Hi,

We help ecommerce brands scale to 7 figures in 90 days.

Let's book a quick call this week.

Best,
Tom

name: 10. Ambiguous / edge case (critical test)
subject: Quick question
body:
Hi,

I received something but I'm not sure if it's correct.

Can you help?
